description_long: This figure depicts an adult male dressed in a Victorian-inspired ensemble, featuring a tall top hat adorned with a subtle emblem, a high-collared double-breasted coat with broad lapels, and layered shoulder pads. The coat is cinched at the waist with a wide belt, complemented by a side pouch and additional belt details. He wears fitted trousers tucked into knee-high boots, and his hands are gloved, adding to the mysterious, almost steampunk aesthetic. The face is partially obscured by a pair of dark glasses or a mask, enhancing the enigmatic appearance. The overall attire is structured and formal, with multiple visible seams, buckles, and layered fabric elements, suggesting a character suited for urban or historical fantasy settings.
description: A Victorian-inspired adult male in a top hat, high-collared coat, gloves, and boots, with a mysterious, formal appearance and layered accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the top hat, high-collared coat, gloves, belt, pouch, and boots, with the face partially obscured by glasses or a mask.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the top hat, layered coat, gloves, and the pouch on the belt, with facial features less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad shoulders, layered coat back, belt, pouch, and the back of the boots, with the top hat's shape clearly outlined.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hat, coat, gloves, and boots, with the pouch and belt details visible.
attribute_clothing_type: Victorian-style formal coat with broad lapels, layered shoulder pads, wide belt, gloves, and tall top hat
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
